>Description:
sysutils/gkrelltop has a MASTER_SITES value of:
http://psychology.rutgers.edu/~zaimi/html/gkrelltop/

This university account now redirects to the main page.

It falls over the FreeBSD backup.
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
find a new MASTER_SITES or remove it completely.
